name: AirTag Scanner
description: Apple AirTag / BLE tracker detector — scans for the FindMy BLE advertisements used by AirTags and compatible trackers to surface possible stalking devices.

boards.name: ESP32 CYD 2.8" Touchscreen
boards.note: CYD build lives in fork hevnsnt/CYD_ESP32-AirTag-Scanner.

note: MatthewKuKanich/ESP32-AirTag-Scanner. CYD touchscreen variant is the hevnsnt fork.
